name: rxbrain-embodied-cognition-vqa
prompt: In two concise sentences (30–40 words), identify every object the robot can manipulate and say where each is located.
answer: The robot can manipulate the following objects: a black sock in the white compartment tray, a white sock in the pink basket, and a purple sock in the pink basket. The black sock is located in the white tray, while the white and purple socks are in the pink basket.
